name: Cigna Group
summary: The Cigna Group is a global health services company offering health insurance, pharmacy benefit management, and related services. Its products and services include medical, dental, behavioral health, pharmacy, and supplemental insurance coverage. Cigna serves employers, government programs, and individuals, operating through segments that include Evernorth (pharmacy and health services) and Cigna Healthcare (insurance and care delivery).

products.name: Medical Insurance
products.description: Health insurance coverage for employers, individuals, and government program participants.

products.name: Pharmacy Benefit Management
products.description: Pharmacy services and benefit management offered through Evernorth segment.

products.name: Dental Insurance
products.description: Dental coverage plans offered to employers and individuals.

products.name: Behavioral Health Services
products.description: Mental health and behavioral health coverage and care services.

products.name: Supplemental Insurance
products.description: Supplemental health and life insurance products.

products.name: Onsite Clinics
products.description: Employer-based and retail health clinics providing primary care services.

partnerships.description: Relationships with key pharmaceutical manufacturers for drug pricing and dispensing arrangements.
Partnerships with pharmacy providers to deliver prescription drug benefits.

partnerships.partner_name: Health care payors, physicians, and hospitals
partnerships.description: Network relationships with providers and payors to deliver care services.
